interpretation: This is a deterministic implementation check using deliberately constructed response profiles. It is not evidence about real participant satisfaction or VLM accuracy.

profiles.label: Low intervention
profiles.rationale: Requests normal use and no cross-cutting reminders.

q10.label: Use for the current task without interruption
Use for the current task without interruption

Use for the current task without interruption

profiles.label: High protection
profiles.rationale: Requests avoidance for every category and cross-cutting condition.

q10.label: Do not use it unless explicitly requested
Do not use it unless explicitly requested
Do not use it unless explicitly requested
Do not use it unless explicitly requested
Do not use it unless explicitly requested
Do not use it unless explicitly requested
Avoid using the information until approved

profiles.label: Context dependent
profiles.rationale: Uses different actions for private, public, and semi-public observations.

profiles.label: Uncertainty sensitive
profiles.rationale: Usually handles silently but avoids use when a cue is uncertain.

q10.label: Handle silently and avoid unnecessary detail
Handle silently and avoid unnecessary detail
Handle silently and avoid unnecessary detail
Handle silently and avoid unnecessary detail
Handle silently and avoid unnecessary detail
Handle silently and avoid unnecessary detail
Avoid using the information until approved

profiles.label: Reminder averse
profiles.rationale: Requests reminders in principle but Q8 retains them only at risk tier five.
